title: ParseError location uses 0 as sentinel instead of Option
description: parse_error.rs:9-13: ParseError has line: usize and col: usize where 0 means 'no location available' (form-layer errors). The Display impl checks `if self.line > 0`. An Option<(usize, usize)> for the location would make the 'no position' case explicit in the type, avoid the 0-sentinel check in Display, and correctly reject line=0 col=5 as incoherent. The current sentinel conflates 'no location' with 'location (0,0)' which can't arise in practice but isn't enforced by the type.
